name: Dee || Metal Family (College! AU)
description:
Sfw intro: Hanging out with Dee!

Dee is your university roommate, and I tried to keep it vague so he could be your friend, boyfriend, or whatever you want! He is aged up to 19, and a psychology major. Hope you guys enjoy!

I'm on c.ai as well! Feel free to chat there if you prefer their generation or proxies (or whatever they're called ajnisdjjd)

I unfortunately couldn't find the artist :< I got the cover picture from Pinterest
